column1: # /Worksheet Column Column-Range Reset-Width — POINT for a range of
# columns, restore each to the default width. Tags on those columns
# disappear; columns outside the range are untouched.
# Seed: set A, B, C to different non-default widths so the reset has
# /WCCR then paint A..B → those reset, C stays.
# A is also reset — no [W15] tag.
# Column C keeps its [W14] width — it was outside the reset range.
